title: Mombasa、Mombasa — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Mombasa、Mombasa的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Mombasa是Mombasa的一個城市，人口約1,208,000。Kenya’s oldest city and major port on the Indian Ocean coast, famous for its beaches, Swahili culture, and historic Old Town.
